title: senecio dregeanus
intro: Senecio dregeanus, also known as Drege's ragwort or bitter bush, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and native to southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Senecio dregeanus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
